steps.title: Use the contrast with idealizing
steps.content: The word but signals that the blank should contrast with idealizing human subjects. Idealizing means presenting people in a perfected or beautified way, so the blank needs a word for depicting people in an unfavorable or nonidealized way.

steps.title: Test the distractor meanings
steps.content:
• Choice B means lacking depth, not presenting people unfavorably.
  • Choice C means inaccurate or vague, which does not directly contrast with idealizing.
  • Choice D means unbelievable, but an unbelievable depiction could still be idealized.
The answer is A.
